description_long: A male figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, dressed in a brown checkered blazer, light blue shirt, and black bow tie, paired with black trousers and brown shoes. The figure has short, dark brown hair styled neatly and a clean-shaven face. The attire is formal and professional, more reminiscent of a classic or academic style than typical medical wear. No visible medical accessories such as a stethoscope, white coat, or badge are present. The figure's hands are open and fingers extended, and the shoes are polished brown leather. The overall appearance suggests a well-groomed professional, but not in standard medical attire.
description: A male figure in a brown checkered blazer, blue shirt, bow tie, black pants, and brown shoes, standing with arms outstretched. No visible medical accessories or white coat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, brown checkered blazer, blue shirt, bow tie, black pants, and brown shoes with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the blazer, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, full back of the blazer, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile from the opposite side, with similar features as the left side.
